description: Organized crime group operating in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark, founded in the 1970s by Željko "Arkan" Ražnatović. Based in Stockholm and Copenhagen, it engages in cigarette smuggling, drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and other crimes. The group gained media attention in the 1990s and is currently led by Milan Ševo.

country_links.evidence_quote: many of whom created organized criminal rings in Germany, Austria, Denmark, and Sweden.
country_links.context: Yugoslav criminals created organized criminal rings in Austria.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Serb mafia as having a 'leading role in smuggling heroin into Denmark'
country_links.context: The organization is based in Copenhagen and is active in smuggling heroin into Denmark.

country_links.evidence_quote: many of whom created organized criminal rings in Germany, Austria, Denmark, and Sweden.
country_links.context: Yugoslav criminals created organized criminal rings in Germany.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Serbian-Montenegrin mafia in Scandinavia, also known as Juggemaffian (English: Yugo Mafia) is an organized crime group in Sweden, Norway and Denmark...
country_links.context: The organization is described as an organized crime group in Norway.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang is based in the cities of Stockholm and Copenhagen, and has territory in Malmö and Gothenburg, among other cities in western Sweden.
country_links.context: The organization is based in Stockholm and has territory in Malmö and Gothenburg; it carries out robberies, cigarette smuggling, and extortion in Sweden.
